name: wisegit
description: MCP server that extracts decision intent from git history and protects intentional code from AI modification. Serves freeze scores, theory gaps, and decision manifests before any file edit.

tools.name: get_file_decisions
tools.description: Get the decision manifest for a file — freeze scores, intent history, recovery levels, and override status for all tracked functions.

tools.name: get_freeze_score
tools.description: Get the freeze score and signal breakdown for a specific function.

tools.name: get_function_history
tools.description: Get the full chronological decision timeline for a function.

tools.name: get_theory_gaps
tools.description: Get functions where original decision rationale may be unrecoverable.

tools.name: get_branch_context
tools.description: Get branch merge history — what was migrated and why.

tools.name: search_decisions
tools.description: Search past decisions by keyword across the repository.

tools.name: create_override
tools.description: Override a frozen function with mandatory reason and optional expiry.

tools.name: extract_intent
tools.description: Extract intent for NOISE commits using the host LLM via MCP sampling.

resources.description: Decision manifest for a source file.

prompts.name: check_before_edit
prompts.description: Protection workflow — check decision manifest before editing a file.
